mnemonics.title: THIS
mnemonics.content: Tells Hidden Instance Self. Use it to clarify which 'self' you mean, just like pointing at yourself in a group photo to say 'this one is me!'

mnemonics.title: Variable Shadowing
mnemonics.content: Very Sneaky Hiding Instance Variables Regularly Embarrasses Newbies. Use 'this' to avoid it!

mnemonics.title: Constructor Chaining
mnemonics.content: Constructors Can Help Initialize New Objects Repeatedly. Use 'this' to chain them!
